description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a combination of a large, flat door on the left and four open shelves on the right. The door is smooth and unadorned, likely concealing a storage compartment, while the open shelves provide easy access to stored items. The cabinet is constructed from light-colored wood with a visible grain pattern, and the back panel appears to be made of a thinner, brown fiberboard material. The shelves are evenly spaced and framed by the same wood as the rest of the structure. The overall build suggests it is sturdy and suitable for storing books, decorative items, or household essentials. Its clean lines and neutral tones make it versatile for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or apartment hallways.
description: A modern wooden cabinet with a large door and four open shelves, featuring a light wood finish and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large left door and four open shelves on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's slim profile and wood grain texture.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain brown fiberboard back panel with visible fasteners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and construction.
